brief: US troops killed in Iranian attack in Jordan and wildfires sending smoke across US and Canada dominate headlines, while Hungary's president resigns after parliament vote. In research, studies on L2 writing and AI coding agents' security highlight ongoing academic concerns.
news_summary: Two US service members were killed and one is missing after an Iranian drone and missile attack on a base in Jordan, prompting US strikes on Iranian targets. Meanwhile, massive wildfires in Canada continue to send smoke into US cities, leading to political tensions between Trump and Canada, while thunderstorms threaten the Northeast.
papers_summary: Research on second language writing pedagogy explores biographical factors, noun phrase complexity, and effects of ChatGPT revision. Technical papers address vulnerabilities in AI coding agents' setup instructions and benchmark multimodal LLMs for visualization literacy.

en.brief: US troops killed in Iranian attack in Jordan and wildfires sending smoke across US and Canada dominate headlines, while Hungary's president resigns after parliament vote. In research, studies on L2 writing and AI coding agents' security highlight ongoing academic concerns.
en.news_summary: Two US service members were killed and one is missing after an Iranian drone and missile attack on a base in Jordan, prompting US strikes on Iranian targets. Meanwhile, massive wildfires in Canada continue to send smoke into US cities, leading to political tensions between Trump and Canada, while thunderstorms threaten the Northeast.
en.papers_summary: Research on second language writing pedagogy explores biographical factors, noun phrase complexity, and effects of ChatGPT revision. Technical papers address vulnerabilities in AI coding agents' setup instructions and benchmark multimodal LLMs for visualization literacy.

zh.brief: 今日世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙備受矚目，此外月經追蹤App隱私問題引發關注，以及梅西與傳奇球星比較話題持續。國際上，美軍在約旦遭伊朗攻擊致兩人陣亡，加拿大野火煙霧影響美國空氣品質。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽阿根廷與西班牙爭冠，獎金創新高；月經追蹤App被指洩露用戶隱私；梅西、馬拉多納、貝利三人誰是最強球星引發討論。
zh.papers_summary: 今日研究聚焦寫作教學與AI輔助寫作，包括第二語言寫作教師身份認同、兒童寫作中的圖文互動，以及ChatGPT對個人陳述修改的影響。

todays_image.caption: The soccer field's goalposts frame a game of offense and defense, mirroring the deadly strike on US troops in Jordan.
todays_image.title: Soccer Game
